stages.concept:
# Unit 119: 4형식 문장의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **4형식 문장의 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> He **gave** me a book. (4형식 능동태)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 4형식은 목적어가 **두 개**(IO, DO)이므로, 수동태도 **두 가지**로 만들 수 있어요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **간접목적어(IO)를 주어로**:

> **I was given** a book (by him).
> 나는 (그에게서) 책을 받았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **직접목적어(DO)를 주어로**:

> **A book was given** to me (by him).
> 책이 (그에 의해) 나에게 주어졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 더 많은 예를 볼까요?

> She **taught** us English. (능동)
> → **We were taught** English by her. (IO 주어)
> → **English was taught** to us by her. (DO 주어)

> Mom **bought** me a bag. (능동)
> → **I was bought** a bag by mom. (IO 주어)
> → **A bag was bought** for me by mom. (DO 주어 — buy는 for!)

**Q. 다음 직접목적어를 주어로 한 수동태 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사를 고르세요.**
"A bag was bought (       ) me by mom."
1. to
2. for ✅
3. of

👩‍🏫 선생님: buy, make 등의 동사가 쓰인 4형식을 수동태로 만들 때 직접목적어(A bag)가 주어로 오면, 남아있는 간접목적어(me) 앞에는 전치사 **for**를 써야 한답니다.
give나 teach 등의 동사였다면 to를 썼을 거예요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: IO가 주어인 수동태가 더 자연스러운 경우가 많아요. (단, buy/make처럼 IO 주어가 어색한 경우 제외)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 4형식은 수동태가 두 개! IO 주어와 DO 주어 둘 다 가능하군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 119: 4형식 문장의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 문장에서 His son을 주어로 하는 수동태 문장을 완성하시오.
He gave his son a book.
→ His son a book by him.
> **정답** was given

---

**02.** She showed me a picture.
→ I a picture by her.
> **정답** was shown

---

**03.** Mom made me a sandwich.
→ A sandwich was made me by Mom.
이 문장은 맞는지 틀린지 고르시오.
> **정답** 맞음 (또는: A sandwich was made for me by Mom.)

---

**04.** He bought her a ring.
→ A ring was bought her by him.
이 문장은 맞는지 틀린지 고르시오.
> **정답** 틀림 → A ring was bought for her by him.

---

**05.** The teacher taught us math.
→ We math by the teacher.
> **정답** were taught

---

**06.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꾸시오. (간접목적어를 주어로)
She gave me a present.
> **정답** I was given a present by her.

---

**07.** He told us a story.
> **정답** We were told a story by him.

---

**08.** Mom cooked us dinner.
> **정답** We were cooked dinner by Mom. (또는 Dinner was cooked for us by Mom.)

---

**09.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꾸시오. (직접목적어를 주어로)
She gave me a present.
> **정답** A present was given to me by her.

---

**10.** He told us a story.
> **정답** A story was told to us by him.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 그녀에게 편지를 받았다.
I a letter by her.
> **정답** was given

---

**12.** 우리는 선생님에게 수학을 배웠다.
We math by the teacher.
> **정답** were taught

---

**13.** 그에게 선물이 주어졌다.
A present was him by her.
> **정답** given to

---

**14.** 나에게 이야기가 들려졌다.
A story was me by him.
> **정답** told to

---

**15.** 그녀는 그에게 사진을 보여 주었다.
He a photo by her.
> **정답** was shown

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 그녀에게 선물을 받았다.
was I given a present by her
> **정답** I / was / given / a / present / by / her

---

**17.** 선물이 나에게 주어졌다.
A present given was to me by her
> **정답** A / present / was / given / to / me / by / her

---

**18.** 우리는 선생님에게 영어를 배웠다.
were We taught English by the teacher
> **정답** We / were / taught / English / by / the / teacher

---

**19.** 그에게 이야기가 들려졌다.
A story told was to him by her
> **정답** A / story / was / told / to / him / by / her

---

**20.** 나는 엄마에게 케이크를 만들어 받았다.
A cake made was for me by Mom
> **정답** A / cake / was / made / for / me / by / Mom
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 119: 4형식 문장의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
Amy gave us a suggestion.
A suggestion was given __________ us by Amy.
to
of
for
with
> **정답** to

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
She bought me a book.
A book was bought __________ me by her.
to
of
at
for
> **정답** for

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
전치사를 고르시오.
She asked the member his name.
His name was asked __________ the member by her.
for
with
of
to
> **정답** of

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
전치사를 고르시오.
Tom taught my children English.
English was taught _________ my children by Tom.
from
to
for
of
> **정답** to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
My father made me a chair.
A chair was made to me by my father.
I was made a chair by my father
A chair was made for me by my father.
A chair is made for me by my father.
> **정답** A chair was made for me by my father.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Amy wrote them a letter.
A letter was written of them by Tom.
They were written to a letter by Amy.
A letter was written for them by Amy.
A letter was written to them by Amy.
> **정답** A letter was written to them by Amy.

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He gave me a birthday present.
I was given a birthday present by him
I was given him a birthday present.
A birthday present was given to me by him.
He was given a birthday present by me.
> **정답** I was given a birthday present by him, A birthday present was given to me by him.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
Amy는 나에게 새 가방을 만들어 주었다.
I was made for the new bag by Amy.
The new bag was made for me by Amy.
The new bag was made to me by Amy.
The new bag was made of me by Amy.
> **정답** The new bag was made for me by Amy.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그녀에게 내 자전거를 팔았다.
She was sold to my bike by me.
My bike was sold of her by me.
My bike was sold to her by me.
My bike was sold for her by me.
> **정답** My bike was sold to her by me.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
A present was given to me by her.
The meal is cooked to us by my mom.
He was taught music by the professor.
The movie is shown to me by my friend.
> **정답** The meal is cooked to us by my mom.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I was given to a present by her.
The books were sold to me by the seller.
The car was bought for me by her.
The money was paid to me by him.
> **정답** I was given to a present by her.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I showed the police my driver's license.
The police showed me my driver's license.
My driver's license was shown for the police
by me.
My driver's license was shown to the police by
me.
The police was shown my driver's license by
me.
• driver's license 운전면허증
> **정답** My driver's license was shown to the police by me., The police was shown my driver's license by me.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Dinner is cooked of me by mom.
The smartphone was found by her.
The computer was bought for me by her.
Hobbies were asked of him by the interviewer.
> **정답** Dinner is cooked of me by mom.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
단어를 쓰시오.
He wrote his daughter a long story.
A long story ___________ his daughter by him.
was written for
was written of
was written
was written to
> **정답** was written to

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
단어를 쓰시오.
Tom gets me some cookies
Some cookies __________ me by Tom.
are gotten for
are gotten of
are gotten to
were gotten for
> **정답** are gotten for

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 카메라는 나에 의해 그에게 팔렸다.
The camera __________ him by me.
was sold of
is sold
was sold by
was sold to
> **정답** was sold to

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The password is asked me by
her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** me → of me

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The house was bought to her
daughter by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to → for

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The candies are given for
children by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
Tom won first prize in the competition yesterday.
He gave a gold medal. He
was celebrated by a lot of people. Many
bouquets were handed for him
by them.
• bouquet 부케, 꽃다발
> **정답** was given, was celebrated, were handed to
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 119 4형식 문장의 수동태 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고치시오.
She teaches her students math.
Math  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by her.
정답 is, taught, to, her, students

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고치시오.
They asked the professor the question.
The question  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
by them.
정답 was, asked, of, the, professor

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고치시오.
Parents bought their daughter a laptop.
A laptop  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by
parents.
정답 was, bought, for, their, daughter

---

**04.** 다음 우리말고 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오
메세지가 Judy에 의해 나에게 보내졌다. [send]
A message  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by Judy.
정답 was, sent, to, me

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 고치시오.
스파게티가 그 유명한 요리사에 의해 우리에게 요리되었
다.
Spaghetti  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by the
famous cook.
정답 was, cooked, for, us

---

**06.** 주어진 문장을 두가지 형태의 수동태로 고치시오.
We showed him an old book.
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by us.
An old book  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by us.
정답 was, showed (shown), an, old, book, was, showed
(shown), to, him

---

**07.** 주어진 문장을 두가지 형태의 수동태로 고치시오.
The king gave them treasure.
Treasure  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by the king.
They  (     )   (     )   (     )  by the king.
• treasure 보물, 대단히 중요한것
정답 was, given, to, them, were, given, treasure

---

**08.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: Who did you send this picture to?
B: This picture  (     )   (     )   (     )  Jessi.
정답 was, sent, to

---

**09.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: What did you offer James?
B: Several jobs  (     )   (     )   (     )  him by me.
정답 were, offered, to

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
We [hand] (     )  homework by the teacher.
We formed a group an]d started doing it. It must
[submit] (     )  the teacher by tomorrow. The
questions [ask] (     )  each student. We
wrote the answer on a piece of paper.
• form 구성하다, 만들다
정답 were handed, be submitted to, were asked of

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 119: 4형식 문장의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom gave us a clue.
A clue was given __________ us by Tom. to of for with
> 정답: to

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He bought me a notebook.
A notebook was bought __________ me by him. to of at for
> 정답: for

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
She asked the visitor his purpose.
His purpose was asked __________ the visitor by her. for with of to
> 정답: of

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
Tom taught my sister math.
Math was taught _________ my sister by Tom. from to for of
> 정답: to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
My mother made me a sweater.
A sweater was made to me by my mother.
I was made a sweater by my mother.
A sweater was made for me by my mother.
A sweater is made for me by my mother.
> 정답: A sweater was made for me by my mother.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Amy wrote them a message.
A message was written of them by Amy.
They were written to a message by Amy.
A message was written for them by Amy.
A message was written to them by Amy.
> 정답: A message was written to them by Amy.

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She gave me a graduation gift.
I was given a graduation gift by her.
I was given her a graduation gift.
A graduation gift was given to me by her.
She was given a graduation gift by me.
> 정답: I was given a graduation gift by her, A graduation

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 나에게 새 모자를 만들어 주었다.
I was made for the new hat by Tom.
The new hat was made for me by Tom.
The new hat was made to me by Tom.
The new hat was made of me by Tom.
> 정답: The new hat was made for me by Tom.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그녀에게 내 시계를 팔았다.
She was sold to my watch by me.
My watch was sold of her by me.
My watch was sold to her by me.
My watch was sold for her by me.
> 정답: My watch was sold to her by me.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
A card was given to me by her.
The stew is cooked to us by my mom.
He was taught art by the instructor.
The photo is shown to me by my friend.
> 정답: The stew is cooked to us by my mom.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I was given to a card by her.
The tickets were sold to me by the agent.
The bag was bought for me by her.
The salary was paid to me by the company.
> 정답: I was given to a card by her.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I showed the officer my passport.
The officer showed me my passport.
My passport was shown for the officer by me.
My passport was shown to the officer by me.
The officer was shown my passport by me.
> 정답: My passport was shown to the officer by me., me., The police was shown my driver's license by me.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Breakfast is cooked of me by dad.
The key was found by him.
The phone was bought for me by her.
Opinions were asked of him by the reporter.
> 정답: Breakfast is cooked of me by dad.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
She wrote her daughter a long essay.
A long essay ___________ her daughter by her.
was written for was written of was written was written to
> 정답: was written to

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
Tom gets me some drinks.
Some drinks __________ me by Tom. are gotten for are gotten of are gotten to were gotten for
> 정답: are gotten for

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 책은 나에 의해 그에게 팔렸다.
The book __________ him by me. was sold of is sold was sold by was sold to
> 정답: was sold to

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  secret  is  asked  me  by her. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: me → of me

**18.** 아래 문장에서

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개) Amy won the art award in school yesterday.
She gave a medal.
She was praised  by a lot of teachers.
Many flowers were handed for her by them.
> 정답: was given, was praised, were handed to her
